mapper.sql: p.id AS id, p.question AS question, p.answer AS correct_answer, p.explanation AS explanation, COALESCE(s.name, '') AS category, p.type AS type, p.difficulty AS difficulty, p.option1 AS option1, p.option2 AS option2, p.option3 AS option3, p.option4 AS option4, p.option5 AS option5, p.is_ai_generated AS is_ai_generated, CASE WHEN p.type = 'PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE' THEN s.name ELSE NULL END AS programming_language
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT FROM problem p INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id WHERE p.id = #{id} UNION ALL SELECT id, question, answer AS correct_answer, explanation, prog_language AS category, 'PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE' AS type, difficulty, NULL AS option1, NULL AS option2, NULL AS option3, NULL AS option4, NULL AS option5, is_ai_generated, prog_language AS programming_language FROM programming_language_problems WHERE id = #{id} ) t LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT FROM problem p INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id UNION ALL SELECT id, question, answer AS correct_answer, explanation, prog_language AS category, 'PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE' AS type, difficulty, NULL AS option1, NULL AS option2, NULL AS option3, NULL AS option4, NULL AS option5, is_ai_generated, prog_language AS programming_language FROM programming_language_problems ) t ORDER BY random() LIMIT #{limit}

choose.when: SELECT id, question, answer AS correct_answer, explanation, prog_language AS category, 'PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE' AS type, difficulty, NULL AS option1, NULL AS option2, NULL AS option3, NULL AS option4, NULL AS option5, is_ai_generated, prog_language AS programming_language FROM programming_language_problems ORDER BY random() LIMIT #{limit}

when.test: category == 'C언어' or category == 'java' or category == 'python' or category == 'Java' or category == 'Python' or category == 'c언어' or category == 'C' or category == 'c'

choose.when: SELECT id, question, answer AS correct_answer, explanation, prog_language AS category, 'PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE' AS type, difficulty, NULL AS option1, NULL AS option2, NULL AS option3, NULL AS option4, NULL AS option5, is_ai_generated, prog_language AS programming_language FROM programming_language_problems WHERE LOWER(prog_language) = LOWER(#{category}) ORDER BY id ASC
choose.otherwise: SELECT FROM problem p INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id WHERE TRIM(COALESCE(s.name, '')) = TRIM(#{category}) ORDER BY p.id ASC

choose.when: WITH subject_random AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (prog_language) id, random() AS rnd FROM programming_language_problems ORDER BY prog_language, random() ) SELECT p.id, p.question, p.answer AS correct_answer, p.explanation, p.prog_language AS category, 'PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE' AS type, p.difficulty, NULL AS option1, NULL AS option2, NULL AS option3, NULL AS option4, NULL AS option5, p.is_ai_generated, p.prog_language AS programming_language FROM programming_language_problems p INNER JOIN subject_random sr ON p.id = sr.id ORDER BY sr.rnd, random()
choose.otherwise: WITH subject_random AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (p.subject_id) p.id AS id, random() AS rnd FROM problem p WHERE p.type = #{type} ORDER BY p.subject_id, random() ) SELECT FROM problem p INNER JOIN subject_random sr ON p.id = sr.id INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id ORDER BY sr.rnd, random()

mapper.select: SELECT UPPER(TRIM(correct_answer)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{p_submitted_answer})) AS is_correct, explanation, correct_answer FROM v_validate_answer WHERE problem_id = #{p_problem_id} AND problem_type = #{p_problem_type}
SELECT total_problems, solved_problems, correct_count, incorrect_count AS wrong_count FROM v_user_statistics WHERE user_id = #{p_user_id}

when.test: category == 'C언어' or category == 'java' or category == 'python' or category == 'Java' or category == 'Python' or category == 'c언어' or category == 'C' or category == 'c'

choose.when: SELECT id FROM programming_language_problems WHERE LOWER(prog_language) = LOWER(#{category}) ORDER BY id ASC
choose.otherwise: SELECT p.id FROM problem p INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id WHERE TRIM(COALESCE(s.name, '')) = TRIM(#{category}) ORDER BY p.id ASC

when.test: category == 'C언어' or category == 'java' or category == 'python' or category == 'Java' or category == 'Python' or category == 'c언어' or category == 'C' or category == 'c'

choose.when: SELECT id FROM programming_language_problems WHERE difficulty = #{difficulty} AND LOWER(prog_language) = LOWER(#{category}) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
choose.otherwise: SELECT p.id FROM problem p INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id WHERE p.difficulty = #{difficulty} AND TRIM(COALESCE(s.name, '')) = TRIM(#{category}) ORDER BY p.id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

choose.when: SELECT id FROM programming_language_problems ORDER BY random() LIMIT #{limit}

mapper.select:
SELECT cat AS subject_name FROM ( SELECT TRIM(COALESCE(s.name, '')) AS cat FROM problem p INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id UNION ALL SELECT prog_language AS cat FROM programming_language_problems ) t
cat IS NOT NULL AND cat != ''
AND cat NOT IN
#{category}
GROUP BY cat ORDER BY random() LIMIT 1

when.test: category == 'C언어' or category == 'java' or category == 'python' or category == 'Java' or category == 'Python' or category == 'c언어' or category == 'C' or category == 'c'

choose.when: SELECT id FROM programming_language_problems WHERE LOWER(prog_language) = LOWER(#{category}) ORDER BY random() LIMIT #{limit}
choose.otherwise: SELECT p.id FROM problem p INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id WHERE TRIM(COALESCE(s.name, '')) = TRIM(#{category}) ORDER BY random() LIMIT #{limit}

mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM problem) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM programming_language_problems)
